g.text: targetId must resolve to an existing model
@id on the same side. One description per
unchanged, added and removed are pairwise
identity is the @id, or the stable PlantUML
alias/label when an element has no @id.
Removed elements are re-injected with a
diagrams too, not only card-bearing ones.
A Closed cycle must have a non-null afterDir
Generate iff the run started from a
Diff mode is keyed on selectedFile.
whose CycleDiff for the file has a non-empty
added/removed set (a real change with a
written .diff), NOT cycles where the file is
only present-unchanged in the snapshot — and
defaults to the latest of them
requires the rendered SVG to exist
